compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK Sileo, S&P TD series, Vents TT series
compatible_devices.notes: Temperature-triggered automatic 2-step fan speed control (minimum speed + full speed) via 3°C hysteresis. AC motor fans only; EC fans requiring 0-10V or PWM signal are NOT compatible. Max 6.5A (~1500W). 5m external temperature probe included. No automation beyond on/off speed step.
